<type>(<scope>): <short summary>

Why:
- Explain the reason for this change.

What:
- List the key changes.
- Keep bullets concise.

Validation:
- [ ] Reviewed changed files
- [ ] Checked spelling/links
- [ ] Tested SQL examples or notes where relevant

Refs:
- Issue: #

Types:
- feat: new content or capability
- fix: correction or bug fix
- docs: documentation-only changes
- refactor: structure change without behavior change
- test: test additions or updates
- chore: maintenance work
